name: Cutie Honey Universe
overview: Honey Kisaragi is an amazingly humanlike and fashion conscious android with the unique ability to transform her body into a wide range of outrageous yet stylish disguises, each of which comes with its own dazzling super ability. After a run-in with a sinister secret criminal cabal organization, Panther Claw, the luscious and law-abiding Honey makes it her mission to bring them down.

trailers.title: アニメ『Cutie Honey Universe』第１弾告知映像／Anime『Cutie Honey Universe』1st PV
